content: Extract WeightedList from AddItem.jsx into a shared component (/components/WeightedList.jsx)
Wire colors[] and fabric_materials[] into ItemDetail.jsx form (toFormState + EDITABLE_FIELDS + UI)
Frontend: add api.reanalyzeItem helper + 'Analyze' button in ItemDetail with progress UX
Change Replace Photo flow in ItemDetail to autoSegment:false (raw save only)
Add i18n strings (en + he) for new UI
Lint, restart backend, smoke-test reanalyze endpoint
